untranslatable_reason: MMD pattern requires dynamic leg-length ratio measurement (second_leg_length vs first_leg_length) which cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. The pattern specifically depends on measuring two distinct wave segments and comparing their magnitudes relative to market regime and volume trend—this requires multi-bar pattern recognition beyond single-bar indicator conditions. Provided conditions approximate regime detection (bull/bear via MA position, volume via vol_ratio_20, trend strength via ADX) but do not capture the core leg-length comparison logic.
